post.description: The presented refresh token is invalidated; a new pair is issued.
post.summary: Rotate refresh token, get new access token
Request a password reset email (no-leak, always 200)
Reset password using a token from email
Verify email using a token from registration email

post.description: Verifies the token against Google's public keys, then issues our own access + refresh pair.
post.summary: Sign in / register with a Google ID token

get.description: Returns 200 with a timestamp. Exposed at /health (not /api/health) so external uptime monitors can keep a stable URL. Opted out of rate limiting via @SkipThrottle().

post.summary: Skip onboarding entirely; mark state as skipped

get.summary: Step 1 · Catalog of motivos (reasons to be here)

post.summary: Step 2 · Save initial mood (also sets User.mood)

post.description: Writes firstName to User and voicePreference to UserPreferences. OnboardingState captures an immutable audit of the original picks.

get.summary: Step 4 · Book recommendation based on chosen motivos

post.summary: Mark onboarding complete; record chosen book (if any)
